turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon, you've reached billing support. My name is Marcus, how can I help you today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I just got my bill and the charges are absolutely ridiculous. I've been overcharged by two hundred dollars and I want it fixed right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me pull up your account right away and take a look at those charges for you.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is the third time this has happened. I want a full refund immediately. I'm sick of calling in about the same issue.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I apologise for the repeated billing errors. That is not the experience we want for you at all. I can see on my screen that you were indeed overcharged by two hundred dollars. I've processed a full refund which will appear on your account within three to five business days. I've also added a twenty dollar credit for the inconvenience and flagged your account for a billing audit so this doesn't happen again.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Fine. Just make sure it actually gets fixed this time.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. I've made a note on your account and our billing team will review it within forty-eight hours. You'll receive an email confirmation of the refund shortly.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay. Thank you for actually sorting it out.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for your patience, and I'm sorry again for the trouble. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
